case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. JAVIER LUNA ET AL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUNA, JAVIER $2,726.95 PRINCIPAL, $560.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $498.00 INTEREST, $279.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,064.45, SEE SCANNED DOC
